    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    S

    safeTrim(String) - Static method in class pane.CustomPuzzlePane
    Safely trims a string, returning an empty string if the input is null.
    setBackButtonClicked(Boolean) - Static method in class pane.CustomPuzzlePane
    Sets the state of the back button click flag.
    setBackButtonClicked(Boolean) - Static method in class pane.ModeSelectionPane
     
    setDifficultyLevel(GameMode) - Method in class mode.GameModeSelector
    Updates the current difficulty level to the specified GameMode.
    setGameContext(GamePane, BasePuzzle, String) - Method in class utils.DigitalTimer
    Stores the current game state variables to allow the timer to communicate with the game UI for hint updates.
    setHint(List<String>) - Method in class item.level.Hard
    Updates or sets the collection of hints for this puzzle.
    setHint(List<String>) - Method in class item.level.Medium
    Updates or sets the collection of hints for this puzzle.
    setHint(List<String>) - Method in interface item.usage.hasHint
    Sets or updates the collection of textual hints for the puzzle.
    setHp(int) - Method in class entity.Player
    Sets the health points (HP) of the player to a specific value.
    setHp(int) - Method in interface item.usage.hasLife
    Updates the health points of the entity to a specific value.
    setMediaPlayer(String) - Static method in class utils.Goto
    Initializes the media player with a specific music URL.
    setName(String) - Method in class entity.Player
    Updates the name of the player.
    setOnTimeOut(Runnable) - Method in class utils.DigitalTimer
    Assigns a custom action to be performed once the timer hits zero.
    setPictureName(String) - Method in class item.base.BasePuzzle
    Assigns a specific picture file name to the puzzle's collection.
    setPictureName(String) - Method in class item.level.Easy
    Adds a picture name to the list of images for this puzzle.
    setPictureName(String) - Method in class item.level.Hard
    Adds a picture name to the list of images for this puzzle.
    setPictureName(String) - Method in class item.level.Medium
    Adds a picture name to the list of images for this puzzle.
    setRootPane(RootPane) - Static method in class utils.Goto
    Sets the global reference for the RootPane container.
    setWindowHeight(double) - Static method in class utils.Goto
     
    setWindowWidth(double) - Static method in class utils.Goto
     
    showAddView() - Method in class pane.CustomPuzzlePane
    Displays the view for adding a new custom puzzle.
    showListView() - Method in class pane.CustomPuzzlePane
    Displays the view containing the list of existing custom puzzles.
    singlePlayerPage(String) - Static method in class utils.Goto
    Constructs and displays the single-player quiz page for Easy, Medium, or Hard levels.
    start(int) - Method in class utils.DigitalTimer
    Initiates the countdown from a specified number of seconds.
    start(Stage) - Method in class application.Main
    The start method initializes the primary Stage of the application.
    startGame() - Method in class mode.GameModeSelector
    Initiates the game session by calling the global quiz initialization utility with the string representation of the currently selected difficulty level.
    stop() - Method in class utils.DigitalTimer
    Immediately stops the countdown timeline if it is currently running.
    styleButton(Button) - Method in class pane.CustomPuzzlePane
    Applies a custom graphical style to a button, including background images, hover effects, and font settings.
    styleButton(Button) - Method in class pane.ModeSelectionPane
     
    styleButton(Button) - Method in class pane.ResultPane
     
    styleButton(Button) - Method in class pane.TitleScreenPane
    Applies the standard button styling including background images, font, and hover effects.
    styleButton(Button, int, double, double) - Method in class pane.ModeSelectionPane
